---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the problem or use case this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases
Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be useful:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Impact
- **Affected Components**: 
  - [ ] API
  - [ ] Worker
  - [ ] Core Library (specify: ___________)
  - [ ] Integration Adapter (specify: ___________)
  - [ ] Database Schema
  - [ ] Documentation
  - [ ] Other (specify: ___________)

- **Breaking Changes**: [ ] Yes [ ] No
  - If yes, describe the breaking changes:

## Architecture Considerations
How does this feature fit into the hexagonal architecture?
- Which bounded context(s) does it affect?
- Does it require new ports/adapters?
- Any domain model changes needed?

## Additional Context
- Screenshots or mockups (if applicable)
- Related issues or discussions
- References to architecture documentation
- Any other context about the feature request

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
